{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323003957A2E09B7FBC53C362093D"}"},"total":85},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7482234888345371417","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的日常美食文，金手指没有太多存在感，很合理"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742096640,"group_id":"7474664567394536472","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4KRE77DvZsBy4U7Q9GaHDs/oyAaiO3BvY9aLrRk7y0R","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2e7f8b99e6bf473bad7287ca9ed64f75~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792045&x-signature=tFc%2FM53Nn87m1In7QJSXl5EvwWI%3D","user_id":"1535373107530414","user_name":"顾一个"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1535373107530414","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7474664567394536472","book_info":{"abstract":"匡睿拒绝内卷，选择回老家躺平。
继承了父亲的卤肉馆，加上拒绝内卷后获得的美食系统。
让他的卤肉馆焕发了新的生机。
原本那些不起眼的家常菜，摇身一变成了顾客争相打卡的网红美食。

比如说肉泥蒸臭豆腐，闻着臭吃着香，一口下去就让人念念不忘，越吃越上瘾。
再比如黄芽菜焖蛋饺，入口软嫩，满嘴留香，仿佛一下子回到了家的感觉。
还有酱爆兔丁和辣椒炒肉粒，又麻又辣，滋味十足，嫩得让人回味无穷。
每天这几道招牌菜，几乎桌桌必点。

渐渐地，口碑传播开来，匡氏卤肉馆成了远近闻名的热门餐馆，每天门庭若市，火得不得了。

当地旅行社逢人便推荐：“要问我们去这里旅游最值得去的地方是哪？肯定是匡老板的这家店，排第一！”  
明星剧组拍戏间隙也不忘调侃：“我们这群人的盒饭啊，认准的就是匡老板的三菜一汤，别家都不行！”  
甚至连道路规划部门都注意到了这个地方：“什么破旧街区？这明明是以匡家卤肉馆为核心的黄金地段，打造文化名片少不了它！”

面对这一切，匡睿淡定地说：“距离景点太远？不重要！咱匡家卤肉馆自己就是一道亮丽的风景线！”

以上故事及人物均为虚构，如有雷同，实属巧合，请勿模仿。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ai/p2o9eaca6330e3bb41137044ebce91934c9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"泰史奈夫","author_id":"","book_id":"7474664567394536472","book_name":"美食：从卤味开始征服村里的狗子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#584838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7133人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7474664599342547480","read_count":"7133","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1801196"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.5","serial_count":"892","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,乡村,系统,美食","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/dfc1118bc5bf1710ae2c29e416e534ca~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779381597&x-signature=Fc7lSeRGFvs91z3AivaqbdatRk0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2722807185408590","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"80"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323003957A2E09B7FBC53C362093D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读58分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3471,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6997},"user_action"
